---
title: Schedule
toastui:
  schedule:
    defaultView: week
    file: "data/schedule.csv"
    file-sep: ","
    date: "2026-11-16"
    useDetailPopup: true
    isReadOnly: true
    height: 960px
    timegridHeight: 900px
    week:
      workweek: true
      taskView: false
      eventView: ['time']
      hourStart: 9
      hourEnd: 21
      showNowIndicator: true
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: Europe/Stockholm
    calendars:
      - id: "session"
        name: "Session"
        color: inherit
        backgroundColor: "#D6EAF8"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#D6EAF8"
        borderColor: "#85C1E9"
      - id: "free"
        name: "Free"
        color: inherit
        backgroundColor: "#FCF3CF"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#FCF3CF"
        borderColor: "#F7DC6F"
      - id: "extra"
        name: "Extra"
        color: inherit
        backgroundColor: "#E8DAEF"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#E8DAEF"
        borderColor: "#BB8FCE"
---

{{< toastui schedule >}}
